questionHtml: Outline the role of UV radiation as a mutagen.
markschemeHtml:
1.  affects/damages/causes change in oncogenes/errors in DNA repair;
  2.  UV radiation might alter complementary base pairing/break hydrogen bonds/fuse bases;
  3.  double helix may uncoil;
  4.  strands may separate/break;
  5.  DNA sequence may be altered/DNA bases may re-connect to different bases after separating;
  6.  DNA strand may break into pieces / fragments of DNA may be lost;

meta.title: Outline the role of UV radiation as a mutagen.
